title: Interface
description: Base ascription schema for Interface ElementDefinitions. Declarative exposure manifest: lists which Effector/Receptor ports are exposed by referencing their identifiers. Interface has no behavior; realization is owned by Mechanisms. Tenant-defined archetypes extending Interface MUST reference this schema via allOf.

effectorIds.description: List of Effector port identifiers exposed by this Interface. A given Effector SHOULD be exposed by at most one Interface within a Structure (enforced by the definition-manager).

receptorIds.description: List of Receptor port identifiers exposed by this Interface. A given Receptor SHOULD be exposed by at most one Interface within a Structure (enforced by the definition-manager).
